info.name: ALDECI Enterprise Security API
info.description:
Complete API collection for ALDECI — AI-native ASPM + CTEM + CSPM platform. Covers all 10 security domains: ASPM, CSPM, CTEM, SOC, GRC, Identity, Network, AI/Threat Intel, Executive, and Platform.

Setup:
1. Set environment variables: base_url and api_key
2. All requests require X-API-Key header (auto-populated via {{api_key}} variable)
3. Base URL: http://localhost:8000 (local) or your deployed instance

Docs: /docs (Swagger UI) | /redoc (ReDoc) | /openapi.json

variable.description: ALDECI API base URL (no trailing slash)
ALDECI API key — obtain from /api/v1/admin or your admin panel
Your organization identifier for multi-tenant isolation

item.name: 01 - ASPM (Application Security Posture Management)
item.description: Application security posture: SBOM generation, supply chain risk, SAST/DAST scanning, and SCA. Covers software composition analysis across CycloneDX and SPDX formats.

request.description: Generate a CycloneDX 1.4 SBOM for a project. Returns a complete bill of materials with component licenses and known vulnerabilities.
Generate an SPDX 2.3 SBOM for a project.
List all projects with SBOM export history.
List all supply chain vendors and their risk scores.
Trigger a SAST (Static Application Security Testing) scan on a repository.
Retrieve SAST findings, optionally filtered by severity.
Trigger a DAST (Dynamic Application Security Testing) scan against a live target URL.
List all DAST findings for the organization.
Software Composition Analysis: cross-reference all SBOM components against known CVEs. Returns exposure summary with KEV and EPSS scores.
Aggregate license risk across all tracked software components.

item.name: 02 - CSPM (Cloud Security Posture Management)
item.description: Cloud security posture management: misconfigurations, CIS benchmarks, drift detection, Kubernetes security, and cloud-native workload protection.

request.description: Overall cloud security posture score across all monitored accounts and providers.
Trigger a full cloud posture scan against AWS, Azure, or GCP account.
List cloud misconfigurations, filterable by severity (critical, high, medium, low).
CIS benchmark compliance status across all monitored cloud accounts.
Configuration drift detection: changes from the last saved baseline.
List all registered Kubernetes clusters and their security posture.
Run CIS Kubernetes Benchmark against a cluster.
Create a cloud compliance assessment for CIS, NIST, SOC2, or PCI-DSS.
Run a posture check on a cloud-native account to identify misconfigurations.
Aggregate cloud-native security statistics across all monitored accounts.

item.name: 03 - CTEM (Continuous Threat Exposure Management)
item.description: Continuous threat exposure: attack path analysis, threat hunting, vulnerability discovery, and pentest management. Aligns with Gartner CTEM framework.

item.name: Attack Paths — Crown Jewels at Risk

request.description: BFS lateral movement analysis: identifies which crown jewel assets are reachable from external entry points.
Add a network node to the attack graph for lateral movement analysis.

body.raw:
{
  "org_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "name": "Lateral Movement Hunt Q2-2026",
  "hypothesis": "Adversary using Pass-the-Hash to move laterally from DMZ to core network",
  "tactic": "TA0008",
  "analyst": "hunter@acme.com"
}

request.description: Create a new threat hunting session with a hypothesis and MITRE ATT&CK tactic.
Execute a hunting session query against collected telemetry.
List AI-discovered vulnerabilities not yet in public CVE databases.
Create a new pentest engagement with scope, methodology, and timeline.

body.raw:
{
  "org_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "title": "SQL Injection in Login Endpoint",
  "severity": "critical",
  "cvss_score": 9.8,
  "description": "Login endpoint vulnerable to blind SQL injection via username parameter",
  "remediation": "Parameterize all database queries",
  "cve": null
}

request.description: Record a finding from a pentest engagement.
Pentest program statistics: engagement counts, finding severity distribution, remediation rates.
Attack graph statistics: node count, edge count, reachable crown jewels.

body.raw:
{
  "org_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "title": "Zero-Day in OpenSSL 3.2",
  "description": "Memory corruption in TLS handshake processing",
  "affected_component": "openssl",
  "affected_version": "3.2.0",
  "cvss_vector": "AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H",
  "proof_of_concept": "PoC code or steps"
}

request.description: Contribute a newly discovered vulnerability to the internal knowledge base for coordinated disclosure.

item.name: 04 - SOC (Security Operations Center)
item.description: SOC operations: alert triage, incident lifecycle management, SOC workflows, and SIEM event ingestion. Supports MTTD/MTTR tracking.

request.description: Ingest a raw alert from any source. ALDECI auto-assigns priority (p1-p4) based on severity and context.
Get the prioritized alert queue (p1 first) for SOC analysts.
Bulk triage multiple alerts in one operation: suppress, escalate, or close.

body.raw:
{
  "org_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "title": "Ransomware Infection — Finance Server",
  "severity": "critical",
  "description": "CryptoLocker variant detected on FINANCE-SRV-01",
  "affected_assets": ["FINANCE-SRV-01", "FINANCE-SRV-02"],
  "reporter": "soc-analyst@acme.com"
}

request.description: Create a security incident. Triggers the 5-state lifecycle: detected → contained → eradicated → recovered → closed.
Get the complete chronological timeline of events for an incident.
MTTD and MTTR metrics aggregated across all incidents.
Create a SOC workflow (IR playbook) with ordered steps and SLA timers.
SOC workflow execution statistics: completion rates, SLA adherence, bottlenecks.
Alert triage statistics: queue depth, MTTR by priority, false positive rate.
Advance incident through the lifecycle: detected → contained → eradicated → recovered → closed.

item.name: 05 - GRC (Governance, Risk & Compliance)
item.description: GRC management: compliance status across 6+ frameworks (SOC2, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, NIST CSF, HIPAA, GDPR), evidence collection, audit management, and regulatory tracking.

request.description: Compliance posture across all frameworks: SOC2, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, NIST CSF, HIPAA, GDPR.
Detailed compliance status for a single framework (soc2, pci-dss, iso27001, nist-csf, hipaa, gdpr).
Auto-collect all evidence types (audit logs, scan results, access matrices, encryption status) for a compliance period.
Evidence coverage percentage by control domain for a compliance framework.
Paginated audit log retrieval with tamper-evident chain verification support.
Generate a compliance report for a specific framework and audit period.
Schedule and track an external audit engagement.
List all compliance control gaps with remediation priority ordering.
Cross-framework control mapping: shows how controls satisfy multiple frameworks simultaneously.
Export audit logs in CSV or JSON format for a date range (audit evidence artifact).

item.name: 06 - Identity & Access Management
item.description: Identity lifecycle, access control, MFA management, privilege escalation detection, and access request workflows. Supports NIST 800-63 IAL1/2/3.

request.description: Real-time RBAC access check: does this user have permission to perform this action on this resource?
Create an RBAC access control policy with MFA and IP allowlist conditions.
Enroll a user in MFA. Methods: totp, sms, email, hardware_key, push.
MFA enrollment rate, method distribution, and authentication event statistics.
Provision a new identity account with role, department, and manager assignment.
Find orphaned accounts (accounts with no manager or inactive owner) for access review.
Privilege escalation activity heatmap by user, time, and system for anomaly visualization.
Submit an access request with justification. Routes to manager for approval.
Approve an access request. Sets expires_at based on requested duration.
Privilege escalation detection statistics: event counts, anomaly rates, top offenders.

item.name: 07 - Network Security
item.description: Network security: firewall policy management, network monitoring, NDR (Network Detection & Response), WAF rules, and NAC device compliance.

request.description: List all managed firewalls with their policy rule counts and last audit timestamp.
Detect conflicting and shadowed firewall rules that may create security gaps.
Ingest a network traffic sample for bandwidth analysis and anomaly detection.
Ingest a network flow for NDR analysis. ALDECI correlates flows against baselines to detect lateral movement.
Run anomaly detection against baseline for a specific asset IP address.
List open NDR alerts sorted by severity.
Run a 5-check device posture evaluation for NAC enforcement decisions.
NAC statistics: device compliance rate, quarantine count, policy violations.
List all active network monitoring alerts triggered by threshold rules.
Firewall policy statistics: total rules, conflicts, shadow rules, unused rules.

item.name: 08 - AI & Threat Intelligence
item.description: AI-powered threat intelligence: TIP (Threat Intelligence Platform), IOC enrichment, threat actor tracking, ML anomaly detection, and TrustGraph knowledge queries.

request.description: Check an IOC (IP, domain, hash, URL) against the Threat Intelligence Platform. Returns TLP rating, confidence score, and associated campaigns.
Bulk ingest IOCs with deduplication. Existing IOCs are updated with new confidence scores.

body.raw:
{
  "org_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "title": "APT29 Campaign Targeting Finance Sector",
  "tlp": "amber",
  "summary": "Nation-state actor targeting SWIFT infrastructure",
  "ioc_ids": ["ioc-001", "ioc-002"],
  "mitre_techniques": ["T1566.001", "T1059.001"]
}

request.description: Create a structured threat intelligence report with TLP classification and MITRE ATT&CK mapping.
List threat actors active in the last 90 days with TTP frequency analysis.
Submit an IOC for enrichment across multiple threat intel sources.
Retrieve aggregated enrichment data for an IOC across all configured sources.
Active threat actor watchlist — actors with confirmed targeting of your industry or org.
TIP statistics: IOC count by type, TLP distribution, source coverage.
AI-powered threat intelligence analysis via the ALDECI Copilot analyst agent. Uses GraphRAG over the TrustGraph knowledge base.
Get AI-computed risk score for an asset, incorporating CVE exposure, network position, and threat actor targeting.

item.name: 09 - Executive & Analytics
item.description: Executive reporting, KPI tracking, risk aggregation, security posture analytics, and board-ready presentations. For CISOs and executive stakeholders.

request.description: One-page executive security summary: MTTD, MTTR, open criticals, compliance score, and top risks.
Mean Time to Detect and Mean Time to Respond metrics for the specified period.
Define a security KPI with target and direction (higher/lower is better).
KPI performance trend: achievement percentage, trend direction, and target gap.
Organization-level composite risk score (A-F grade) aggregated across all domains.
Risk heatmap: entity-level risk scores visualized by likelihood × impact.
Generate an executive security report for board or CISO audience.
Export an executive report as PDF for board distribution.
12-week risk trajectory: are we improving or regressing? Trend line with velocity.
List all board-ready security presentations with slides and talking points.

item.name: 10 - Platform & System
item.description: Platform health, system status, brain pipeline execution, OpenClaw red team automation, and scheduled reports. Core operational endpoints.

request.description: Basic health check. Returns 200 OK when the API is running. No auth required. Used by load balancers and Kubernetes liveness probes.
Deep health check: verifies database connectivity, Redis queue, TrustGraph, and all engine subsystems.
Returns current API version, build info, and feature flags.
Full system status including engine health, queue depth, active incidents, and resource utilization.
Trigger the ALDECI brain pipeline: data collection → normalization → correlation → evidence generation → risk scoring.
Recent brain pipeline run history with status, duration, and error details.
Trigger an OpenClaw autonomous red team scan. Runs attack simulation across specified targets.
List all active report delivery schedules (email/Slack/webhook).
Schedule automated report delivery via email or Slack on a cron schedule.
Comprehensive platform health dashboard: all engine status, active jobs, resource usage, and SLA metrics at a glance.
